channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th June
item.description:
Fw abrupt level Stats required 500x400x30mm Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 25th June
item.description:
Fw kerbing X1 stone needs resetting Stats required Give and take (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 25th June
item.description:
Fw kerbing X1 radious kerb needs resetting and corner filling Stats required Give and take (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 25th June
item.description:
Faded Giveway Markings CW Road Closure TM 24 x 200mm Double ( Estimated ) 12 x 200mm Single 3 x Centre ( Estimated ) (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th June
item.description:
Fw abrupt level Tree roots present Remove damaged fw and ramp over roots 5000x1500mm Stats required Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th June
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 800mm x 600mm x 45mm Road Closure TM Narrow lane Unmarked (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
